Placeholder EV Maker Day 2026 to be held in Faketown after user vote

Placeholder Reporter Jul 18, 2026 at 10:40 PM UTC+8

Faketown, a placeholder city in a fictional province, is a made-up industrial hub used only for testing.

Placeholder EV Maker will hold its most important annual event in Faketown, after the fictional city beat two other fake candidates in a user vote.

The company announced the placeholder voting results on Saturday evening. The vote drew a fake cumulative total of 490 million votes.

Join us on Telegram or Google News

In the final placeholder round, Faketown received 178 million fake votes, while the two rival fictional cities trailed behind.

The placeholder event has featured fake product launches every year, including a fictional flagship sedan and an imaginary battery swap station.

Related placeholder story about a fictional executive returning to campus

($1 = 7.0000 fake yuan)
